headline: Sempra’s Gas Rate Decline And Grid Role Versus Current Valuation
summary: Southern California Gas Company, part of Sempra (NYSE:SRE), released a report describing a significant long term decline in average residential natural gas rates. The report highlights how existing gas infrastructure supported grid reliability and energy supply during recent weather events. SoCalGas also outlined how natural gas systems can work alongside renewables to support California’s energy transition. For you as an investor, this update offers a view into what Sempra actually...
